news.headline: Trump releases perfume with Jill Biden photo amidst Notre-Dame visit, capitalizing on all opportunities for profit.
news.summary: President-elect Donald J. Trump has been seen capitalizing on various opportunities, such as a recent interaction with Jill Biden at Notre-Dame. This incident reflects a pattern of commercializing his associations, with this event being just one example of that behavior.

news.headline: Millicom, also known as Tigo, has engaged in share repurchase activities.
Global swimming pool market to grow by 7.44 Billion USD (2024-2028) with rise in demand for luxurious lifestyles; AI driving trends - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market dynamics. The latest projections suggest that the worldwide swimming pool market is set to expand significantly, registering a growth of approximately USD 7.44 billion between 2024 and 2028, as indicated by research from Technavio. Throughout the forecast period, the market is anticipated to achieve a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.64%.

news.headline: Global ad industry reaching $1 trillion, with 5 companies to take over half revenue. Big Tech and merger shakes market.
news.summary: Five multinational companies are projected to capture over 50% of the worldwide advertising revenue. The burgeoning dominance of Big Tech is believed to be driving a significant merger in the advertising agency sector. The advertising industry is anticipated to reach a staggering $1 trillion value, with these top players consolidating power as the new 'Big 5' entities.

news.headline: Oracle stock drops after Q2 earnings report - sales and earnings fall short of expectations. Strong AI demand highlighted.
news.summary: After the release of its Q2 earnings report on Monday, Oracle experienced a decline in its stock value. The report revealed lower-than-expected sales and earnings for the tech giant. Despite this, Oracle highlighted a significant increase in demand for its AI technology. The exact numbers of the sales and earnings miss were not disclosed in the news article.

news.headline: Agios Pharmaceuticals stock drops 21% due to unexpected side effect of thalassemia drug mitapivat.
news.summary: Agios Pharmaceuticals experienced a drastic drop in its stock value of 21% following an unforeseen side effect linked to the company's thalassemia medication, mitapivat. The unexpected development raised concerns about the drug's safety, which was previously considered very safe. This news caused a significant downturn in the company's shares.

news.headline: AI software maker C3.ai beats revenue estimates in fiscal Q2, shares rise. Smaller-than-expected loss reported.
news.summary: The stock of AI company C3.ai surged following the release of their fiscal Q2 earnings report, which showed a smaller loss than anticipated. Revenue exceeded expectations. This positive news resulted in a rise in shares for the artificial intelligence software maker.

news.headline: MongoDB stock soars on Q3 earnings beat, with 22% sales increase, outpacing expectations.
news.summary: Shares of MongoDB saw a significant increase in value following the release of its third-quarter financial results, which exceeded analyst forecasts. The company reported a 22% increase in sales, driving its stock higher. This positive performance has led to newfound investor interest and optimism in the database software player.

news.headline: UnitedHealth stock rebounds after CEO's murder; Wall Street evaluates impact on profitability.
news.summary: The stock of UnitedHealth experienced a partial recovery after facing a decline, as financial analysts on Wall Street evaluate the potential impact of the tragic death of the CEO of its UnitedHealthcare insurance division on the company's profitability. The recent sell-off of UnitedHealth stock has been deemed as 'unjustified' by market experts. The incident has brought attention to the uncertainty surrounding the implications of the CEO's murder on the company's financial performance.

news.headline: AppLovin stock drops after being rejected for S&P 500, impacting investors.
news.summary: AppLovin's stock experienced a decline on Monday following its exclusion from the S&P 500 index during the quarterly rebalancing. The rejection resulted in a drop in the company's stock value. This news highlights the impact of not being included in the S&P 500 on AppLovin's market performance.

news.headline: ComEd and Ameresco finish solar project in Belvidere; 160th project in Illinois, benefits county and businesses.
news.summary: In Belvidere, Illinois, a ribbon-cutting ceremony was held for a community solar project at a former landfill owned by Boone County and operated by the city of Belvidere. The event was attended by key figures including ComEd President and CEO Gil Quiniones, Illinois Commerce Commission Chairman Doug Scott, Boone County Board Chairman Karl Johnson, and representatives of Ameresco, Inc. This solar project is the 160th in ComEd’s northern Illinois service area and stands out as one of the initial projects catering to a county government and local businesses.

news.headline: In-car Wi-Fi market to surge by USD 270.54 billion from 2024-2028 at CAGR of 49.01%, influenced by AI advancements - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report driven by AI technologies, it has been projected that the global market for In-car Wi-Fi is set to witness substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 270.54 billion expected between 2024 and 2028. This growth is anticipated to occur at a remarkable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 49.01% throughout the forecast period. The analysis points towards significant developments in this sector, indicating a promising future for the In-car Wi-Fi market on a global scale.

news.headline: Global publishing market to grow by $19.37B (2024-2028) driven by demand for diverse content and AI impact per Technavio.
news.summary: Research on the influence of AI on market patterns reveals that the worldwide publishing sector is projected to increase by approximately $19.37 billion between 2024 and 2028, as indicated by Technavio. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 1.2% throughout the forecasted period. The growth is attributed to...

news.headline: AI in Education Market to increase by USD 2.32 Billion (2024-2028) due to demand for customized learning powered by AI - Technavio.
news.summary: New York, December 9, 2024 - Recent analysis reveals the significant impact of AI in reshaping markets worldwide. The estimated growth of the global artificial intelligence (AI) market within the education sector is projected to reach USD 2.32 billion between 2024 and 2028, as reported by Technavio. This market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of...

news.headline: Pembina Pipeline Corp. to redeem 1,028,130 Series 22 Preferred Shares on Jan 8, 2025 (TSX: PPL.PF.B).
news.summary: Calgary-based Pembina Pipeline Corporation, listed on TSX and NYSE as PPL and PBA respectively, plans to redeem its Cumulative Redeemable Floating Rate Class A Preferred Shares, Series 22 (TSX: PPL.PF.B), with a total of 1,028,130 shares on January 8, 2025. The redemption will be made in line with the terms outlined for the Series 22 Shares.

news.headline: Nostromo Energy gets $305M from US DOE to install IceBrick® systems in 193 CA buildings to reduce cooling costs.
news.summary: Nostromo Energy has announced the allocation of funds for the implementation of its IceBrick® thermal energy storage systems in a total of 193 commercial buildings throughout California. The company, based in Irvine, revealed this decision on December 9, 2024. IceBrick® is a unique solution that utilizes virtual power plant (VPP) technology to store thermal energy efficiently.

news.headline: Onex Corporation's substantial issuer bid gets exemptive relief from OSC for certain requirements, details in Circular.
news.summary: Toronto, December 9, 2024 - Onex Corporation disclosed that, as part of their substantial issuer bid (the “Offer”), they have secured an order from the Ontario Securities Commission for exemptive relief concerning extension, proportionate take-up, and disclosure requirements related to the Offer. The Company’s trading symbol on the Toronto Stock Exchange is ONEX. More information about the Order can be found in the offer to purchase and issuer bid circular (the “Circular”) available on SEDAR+, located at www.sedarplus.ca.

news.headline: Ashland celebrates 100-year anniversary by ringing opening bell at NYSE; plans investor strategy event on December 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a company is scheduled to host an investor strategy update event. This event will offer insights into the company's plans and direction for the future. Investors can expect to receive crucial information about the company's financial performance, growth strategies, and upcoming projects. Mark your calendars for this important event on December 10, 2024, as it will provide valuable information for stakeholders.

news.headline: Psycho Bunny opens 100th store in Quebec City at Place Ste-Foy, celebrating its bold style. Paying tribute to Quebec roots.
news.summary: Quebec City welcomes the grand opening of the 100th outlet of the globally renowned Quebec brand, Psycho Bunny. Situated in Place Ste-Foy, this new boutique showcases the brand's distinct style and creative ethos. By selecting Quebec City for this important achievement, Psycho Bunny not only honors its origins but also strengthens its global footprint. The milestone store embodies the brand's commitment to exceptional quality and innovation, establishing a unique shopping experience for customers.

news.headline: Maverick Protocol introduces 'MemeFi' to Base via goose.run, allowing users to lend and borrow against memecoins.
news.summary: A team member informed Cointelegraph that a platform called goose.run has been recently introduced. This platform allows users to lend and borrow funds using memecoins.

news.headline: GCC's credit rating upgraded to 'BBB' by Fitch Ratings, with $500M senior notes due 2032. Solid performance and financial position cited as reasons.
news.summary: In Chihuahua, Mexico, on December 09, 2024, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV:GCC), a prominent cement and concrete producer in the US and Mexico, disclosed an upgrade by Fitch Ratings. The Company's local and foreign currency long-term Issuer Default Ratings (IDRs) and US$500 million senior notes due 2032 were raised to 'BBB' from 'BBB-', both with a stable outlook. This elevation is attributed to GCC's robust operating performance, steady organic growth, and financial stability. Fitch's assessment is underpinned  by five key factors:1. Strong operational performance bolstered by resilient demand and the Odessa plant expansion.2. Prudent financial management emphasizing a robust balance sheet and financial adaptability.3. Strategic expansions fueled by targeted investments.4. Significant leadership positions in the industry.For more details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings upgrades GCC's credit rating to 'BBB', including a US$500 million senior notes due 2032, with stable outlook.
news.summary: In Chihuahua, Mexico on December 9, 2024, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. revealed that Fitch Ratings has elevated the Company's local and foreign currency long-term Issuer Default Ratings (IDRs) along with US$500 million senior notes due 2032 to 'BBB' from 'BBB-', holding a stable outlook. GCC, a prominent cement and concrete producer operating in the United States and Mexico, trades on the BMV under GCC*.

news.headline: Natuzzi S.p.A. sets dates for releasing financial info and conference call for first nine months and Q3 of 2024.
news.summary: Natuzzi S.p.A, based in Santeramo in Colle, Bari, Italy, has disclosed the schedule for reporting the financial results for the initial three quarters and third quarter of 2024. This announcement indicates the company's commitment to transparency and timely dissemination of critical information. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate gaining insights into Natuzzi's performance during these periods.

news.headline: Serve Robotics appoints Lily Sarafan to its Board of Directors, effective Dec. 09, 2024, increasing diversity and expertise.
news.summary: Serve Robotics Inc., a prominent company specializing in embodied AI and automation, revealed today the addition of Lily Sarafan to its Board of Directors. This announcement was made on December 09, 2024. Lily Sarafan joins the board of Serve Robotics Inc. (Nasdaq: SERV), bringing valuable expertise to the team.

news.headline: Oracle's stock rally moderates after latest results fall short of expectations.
VCA and Antech push for enhanced pet data in public health, propose six-step framework for collaboration with ambitious large-scale study.
news.summary: VCA, a division of Mars Veterinary Health, and Antech aim to work together with One Health reporting groups on a national scale to enhance health initiatives. A six-step framework has been developed for this purpose. The pet health companies are implementing this framework by conducting a comprehensive study involving a significant number of individuals and pets.

news.headline: Fed's Beige Book: Economic growth up, consumer spending stable, hiring slows. 3 districts show growth, 2 decline. Consumer-oriented businesses see soft sales. Low mortgage demand noted. Farm equipment sales slow.
news.summary: In November, the U.S. economy experienced a slight rise in activity according to the Federal Reserve's Beige Book report. Three out of 12 districts reported modest or moderate growth, while two districts saw flat or slightly declining activity. The report highlighted optimism among businesses for increased demand in the upcoming months. Key insights included stable consumer spending, especially in consumer-oriented businesses which were sensitive to price increases. However, restaurants saw softer sales, and apparel and snowmobile sales were affected by weather conditions. The report also noted low mortgage demand and highlighted farm equipment sales as a hindrance on investment activity. Overall, the report signaled expectations for continued growth across various sectors and geographies.

news.headline: NYSE is delisting The Container Store Group, Inc. due to non-compliance with regulations; stock trading suspended immediately.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), it was revealed that the NYSE Regulation team has decided to initiate proceedings for the delisting of The Container Store Group, Inc.'s common stock from the exchange. This move will lead to an immediate suspension of trading in the Company's common stock. The decision to delist the Company's common stock was made in accordance with Section 802.01B of the NYSE's Listed Company Manual due to certain reasons.

news.headline: Stocks decline as Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq dip. Amazon's rally halts as Hershey sees gains. Live coverage.
news.summary: During Monday afternoon, the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all maintained their downward trajectory. Amazon.com stock, after a consistent increase, abruptly reversed course and experienced a decline. The stock market closed near its lowest point of the day. A significant factor affecting the market was Nvidia experiencing a challenging day. Additionally, the previously ongoing rally for Amazon.com stock came to an end. The day also saw Hershey making changes that appeared to have a sweetening effect. This live update portrays the fluctuating and dynamic nature of the stock market trends.

news.headline: AT&T CEO to update shareholders at UBS Global Media Conference on Dec. 10, discussing multi-year strategic growth plan.
news.summary: Tomorrow in Dallas, the CEO of AT&T is set to engage in a fireside chat, detailing the company's multi-year strategic growth plan. The focus of the plan is on implementing key strategies to drive growth. This event will shed light on AT&T's initiatives to expand, with specific emphasis placed on future growth opportunities. The chat aims to provide insights into AT&T's plan, highlighting key takeaways for stakeholders.

news.headline: Bitcoin hit $100,000 but fell; Ark Invest's Cathie Wood predicts $3.8M by 2030. $100 today could yield 0.00103 BTC.
news.summary: Bitcoin briefly crossed the $100,000 milestone in December. Ark Invest CEO Cathie Wood, a prominent crypto bull, predicts a high price target ahead. Wood has advocated for the cryptocurrency sector, foreseeing potential help from the new White House administration. Wood has shared price targets, with a peak of $3.8 million for Bitcoin by 2030. A small investment in Bitcoin now could generate significant returns if Wood's projections are met. With Bitcoin reaching all-time highs post the 2024 presidential election, speculations arise about its potential peak. Wood's 2030 price targets range from bear to bull cases, with a new scenario estimating the highest possible value if companies allocate 5% to Bitcoin. Currently priced at $97,106.64, an investor could purchase 0.00103 BTC with $100. The article elaborates on the potential returns on this investment in line with Wood's projections.

news.headline: Macy’s, Inc. will report Q3 2024 earnings on Dec 11, 2024. Call with CEO & CFO at 8:00 a.m. EST. Public can access webcast.
news.summary: Macy’s, Inc. (NYSE: M) is set to announce its third quarter 2024 sales and earnings figures on December 11, 2024. The financial results will be revealed during a call and webcast at 8:00 a.m. EST that will involve Macy’s, Inc.’s Chairman and CEO Tony Spring and COO/CFO Adrian Mitchell. The live webcast and related presentation will be available for the general public and media audience.

news.headline: Valero Energy Corp. (NYSE: VLO) to report Q4 & full-year 2024 earnings on Jan 30, 2025, with a 10:00 a.m. ET conference call. Join on investorvalero.com.
news.summary: Valero Energy Corporation, a leading energy company listed on NYSE as VLO, based in San Antonio, Texas, is set to hold a conference call on January 30, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The purpose of the call is to discuss the earnings results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, set to be released on the same day, and offer insights into the company's operations. Those interested can tune in to the webcast on Valero's Investor Relations website at investorvalero.com. Valero Energy Corporation is known for its significant presence in the energy sector.

news.headline: VICI Properties prices $750 million senior unsecured notes at 5.125% due 2031, issued at 99.643% of par value. Interest payable biannually.
news.summary: In a recent update, VICI Properties Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, VICI Properties L.P., has successfully priced a public offering of $750 million in total of 5.125% senior unsecured notes due 2031. These notes, issued at 99.643% of par value, are set to mature on November 15, 2031. Interest on the notes will be paid in cash biannually on May 15 and November 15, with the first payment scheduled for May. This move aims to secure funds for future ventures and operations, marking a significant financial development for VICI Properties.

news.headline: Olin Corporation's Investor Day on Dec 12, 2024, from 9am-12pm (ET) with Ken Lane, President & CEO, and Todd Slater, SVP & CFO.
news.summary: In Clayton, Missouri, on December 9, 2024, Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN) disclosed its plans to hold an Investor Day on December 12 from 9:00am to 12:00pm (Eastern Time). Ken Lane, the President & CEO, and Todd Slater, the Senior Vice President & CFO, will be leading the event alongside other executive team members.

news.headline: TETWP marks 20 years battling breast cancer, starting as idea, now powerful grassroots campaign.
news.summary: In NAPA, California, on December 9, 2024, Tough Enough to Wear Pink (TETWP) marks a momentous occasion as the grassroots campaign commemorates a significant anniversary. Initially just a daring concept, TETWP has evolved into a monumental force within the western industry's fight against breast cancer. The campaign, known for its powerful impact, has mobilized numerous individuals to join the cause, bringing hope and support to countless individuals.

news.headline: Crane Company promotes Alejandro Alcala to COO, overseeing all business segments and Crane Business System.
news.summary: Stamford, Connecticut - Crane Company (NYSE: CR), a leading industrial manufacturing and technology firm, has appointed Alejandro (Alex) Alcala as the new Chief Operating Officer (COO). Effective immediately, Alcala will be responsible for overseeing all Crane business segments and the Crane Business System organization. Max H. Mitchell, Chairman, President, and CEO of Crane Company, expressed his confidence in Alcala's capabilities for the role.

news.headline: Asana to present at Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference on Dec 11, 2024 at 8:40am PT. Leading enterprise work management platform with over 150.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Asana, Inc., a prominent enterprise work management platform listed on NYSE as ASAN and LTSE as ASAN, shared news that its executives will be speaking at the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference on December 11, 2024, at 8:40 a.m. PT / 11:40 a.m. ET. This event will be broadcasted live on Asana’s website at https://investors.asana.com. Asana is known for connecting work to goals as a leading platform in its field, with over 150 being part of its network.

news.headline: WisdomTree named in the 2024 Best Places to Work in Money Management list by Pensions & Investments for fifth year.
news.summary: WisdomTree has been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work in Money Management for 2024 by Pensions & Investments. This marks the fifth consecutive year that WisdomTree has received this honor.

news.headline: Universal Display Corporation in Ewing, N.J., recognized by Newsweek for its responsibility, making America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 list.
news.summary: A company based in Ewing, New Jersey, Universal Display Corporation, has been recognized for its responsible practices by being included in Newsweek's list of America's Most Responsible Companies for the year 2025. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to ethical and sustainable operations.

news.headline: Greif debuts ModCan™ at Pack-Expo, a modular packaging solution to enhance shipping safety and efficiency. NYSE: GEF, GEF.B
news.summary: In Delaware, Ohio, on December 9, 2024, Greif, Inc. revealed the introduction of ModCan™ at the Pack-Expo event in Chicago. Greif, Inc., a prominent player in industrial packaging products and services with listings on NYSE under GEF and GEF.B, presented this novel modular packaging solution. ModCan™ aims to enhance effectiveness and safety in the transportation and storage of various materials and waste.

news.headline: Japan Smaller Capitalization Fund, Inc. announces $0.3118 in ordinary income distribution.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the economy grew by 3.5% in the third quarter of the fiscal year, exceeding expectations. This growth was driven by a surge in consumer spending, which rose by 5.2%, the highest increase in the past five years. Additionally, business investment saw a 7% increase, reflecting growing confidence in the market. Unemployment also fell to 4.1%, the lowest rate in a decade. These positive indicators suggest a strong and stable economic outlook for the upcoming months.

news.headline: Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) releases FY 2024 Q4 results as the leading luxury home builder, Oct 31, 2024.
news.summary: Fort Washington, Pennsylvania - As of December 9, 2024, Toll Brothers, Inc. disclosed its fourth-quarter outcomes for the period ending on October 31, 2024. Toll Brothers, Inc., recognized as the prominent constructor of upscale residences in the United States, shared this information. The company's stock trades on the NYSE under the symbol "TOL," with additional details available on the official website TollBrothers.com.

news.headline: Coherent releases first 100G ZR QSFP28-DCO to operate over -40°C to +85°C. #opticalnetworking #CoherentCorp
news.summary: Coherent Corp., a prominent player in high-performance optical networking solutions, has recently revealed the launch and production of the world's inaugural 100G ZR QSFP28 DCO transceiver. This cutting-edge technology is designed to function over the industrial temperature range, spanning from -40°C to +85°C. This release signifies a significant advancement in the field of optical networking, setting a new standard for efficiency and performance.

news.headline: Roche initiating tender offer for Poseida Therapeutics at $9/share in cash plus CVR for up to $4/share.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Roche (SIX: RO, ROG; OTCQX: RHHBY) initiated a tender offer to acquire all outstanding common shares of Poseida Therapeutics, Inc. (Poseida) (NASDAQ: PSTX) for $9.00 per share in cash, with an additional non-tradeable contingent value right (CVR) for potential contingent payments totaling up to $4.00 per share in cash. This offer is part of a merger agreement dated November 25, 2024, involving Roche Holdings, Inc. (a subsidiary of Roche Holding Ltd), Blue Giant Acquisition Corp., and Poseida.

news.headline: Rocket Lab's successful suborbital hypersonic launch tested technology for the Department of Defense. #RKLB #hypersonic
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (Nasdaq: RKLB) reported a successful suborbital mission conducted in November to evaluate hypersonic technology for the Department of Defense. This crucial mission showcased hypersonic test launch abilities via the Multi-Service Advanced Capability Hypersonics Test Bed (MACH-TB) initiative, designed to enhance hypersonic flight trials for the U.S. military. Rocket Lab, renowned for its launch services and space systems globally, continues to be at the forefront of cutting-edge space technology.

news.headline: Manulife warns investors about New York Stock and Bond LLC offering to buy up to 50,000 of its common shares.
news.summary: In a press release dated December 9, 2024, Manulife, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange, New York Stock Exchange, and PSE under the symbols MFC and on SEHK under 945, announced that New York Stock and Bond LLC (New York Stock and Bond) has initiated an unsolicited mini-tender offer. The offer proposes to acquire a maximum of 50,000 common shares of Manulife, which represents less than 0.003% of the total outstanding shares.

news.headline: DiamondRock Hospitality (NYSE: DRH) declares $0.23 per common share Q4 dividend, totaling $0.32 per share for 2024.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, on December 9, 2024, DiamondRock Hospitality Company (NYSE: DRH) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.23 per common share for the fourth quarter of 2024. This brings the total dividends for the year to $0.32 per share.

news.headline: Dover CFO Brad Cerepak to retire on Jan 31, 2025; Chris Woenker, 42, named as successor. Characters: 82
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Dover Corporation (NYSE: DOV) revealed that Brad Cerepak, their Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will retire on January 31, 2025. Aged 42, Christopher "Chris" Woenker will succeed him as the new Chief Financial Officer.

news.headline: Smartsheet shareholders approve acquisition by Blackstone and Vista Equity Partners, fulfilling shareholder vote condition.
news.summary: Bellevue, Washington-based Smartsheet (NYSE:SMAR) disclosed today that its shareholders have widely voted in favor of the Merger Proposal for the company’s intended purchase by funds handled by Blackstone and Vista Equity Partners, marking a significant milestone. This acquisition was first revealed in September 2024. The approval from shareholders meets the critical condition of their vote for finalizing the acquisition deal. The merger is anticipated to bring substantial value to the company and its stakeholders.
